entities.name: Ars Notoria

attributes.description: Angelic art of knowledge acquisition through prayer and notation
attributes.function: contains all arts and sciences in brief notes

entities.raw_quote: Ars Notoria — angelic art of knowledge acquisition through prayer and notation

entities.name: Solomon

attributes.title: King
attributes.authorship: Lemegeton, Treatise on Spiritual and Secret Experiments

entities.raw_quote: Solomon witnesseth: Therefore it is called, The Notary Art, because in certain brief Notes, it teacheth and comprehendeth the Knowledge of all Arts

entities.name: The Angel
entities.raw_quote: the Angel that declared it to Solomon, laid an inexcusable prohibition upon it

entities.name: The Queen of Tongues

attributes.function: removes impediments of the tongue and grants eloquence

entities.raw_quote: this is an Oration which in the Scriptures we are taught to have alwayes in our mouthes; but it is taken out of the Chaldean Language

entities.name: Lameth, Leynach, Semach, Belmay, Azzailement, Gesegon, Lothamasim, Ozetogomaglial, Zeziphier, Josanum, Solatac, Bozefama, Defarciamar, Zemait, Lemaio, Pheralon, Anuc, Philosophi, Gregoon, Letos, Anum

attributes.usage: to be said at beginning of month and Scripture

entities.raw_quote: Lameth, Leynach, Semach, Belmay... Azzailement, Gesegon, Lothamasim, Ozetogomaglial...

entities.name: Eliphasmasay, Gelonucoa, Gebeche Banai, Gerabcai, Elomnit
entities.raw_quote: By thy Archangels, Eliphasmasay, Gelonucoa, Gebeche Banai, Gerabcai, Elomnit

entities.name: Do., Hel., X., P., A., Li., O., F

attributes.function: glorious Angels’ names (incomprehensible to human sense)

entities.raw_quote: whose names are so Consecrated, that they cannot be uttered by us; which are these, Do., Hel., X., P., A., Li., O., F, &c.

entities.name: Theos Patir Heminas

attributes.function: invoked in prayers for memory and illumination

entities.raw_quote: O Most Mighty God, Invisible God, Theos Patir Heminas

entities.name: The Oration of the Physical Art
entities.raw_quote: Ihesus fili Dominus Incompehensibilis; Ancor, Anacor, Anylos...

entities.name: The Miraculous and Efficacious Foundation of the Physical Science

attributes.attribute: contains whole physical science in brief

entities.raw_quote: The Miraculous and Efficacious Foundation of the Physical Science

entities.name: Assay

attributes.function: first part of a key Oration, used before speech or study

entities.raw_quote: the first and chiefest thing to be understood therein... the Oration before the second Chapter, it to be used long before every speech, the beginning whereof is Assay

entities.name: Lamed, Rogum, Ragia, Ragium, Ragiomal, Agaled, Eradioch, Anchovionos, Lochen, Saza, Ya, Manichel, Mamacuo, Lephoa, Bozaco, Cogemal, Saluyel, Tesunanu, Azaroch, Beyestar, Amak

attributes.function: used to comprehend large volumes of writing

entities.raw_quote: Lamed, Rogum, Ragia, Ragium...

entities.raw_quote: Oh Eternal and Unreprehensible Memory! Oh Uncontradictible Wisdom! Oh Unchangeable Power!

entities.name: The Gemme and Crown of the Lord

attributes.function: protection from fire and wild beasts
attributes.origin: revealed by one of four Angels given power over Earth, Sea, Trees

entities.raw_quote: This Oration is also called by Solomon, The Gemme and Crown of the Lord

entities.name: The Signe of the Grace of God
entities.raw_quote: Therefore Solomon commandeth it to be called, The Signe of the Grace of God

attributes.function: beginning of a powerful Oration that moves celestial spirits

entities.raw_quote: Achacham, Yhel, Chelychem, Agzyraztor, Yegor, &c.

entities.raw_quote: Heilma, Helma, Hmena, &c. Oh God the Father, God the Son, God the Holy Spirit

attributes.function: beginning of second part of Oration

relationships.from: The Gemme and Crown of the Lord

summary: This chunk details the Ars Notoria, a grimoiric system attributed to Solomon involving angelically revealed orations and divine names for acquiring knowledge, eloquence, memory, divination (especially medical prognosis), and protection. It outlines timing (lunar phases), ritual conditions (fasting, devotion), and lists numerous sacred names and prayers with specific applications.
key_passages: Let it be read in appointed times of the Lunation; as, in the fourth day of the Moon, the eighth and twelfth... verily believing, That thereby thy study shall suddenly be increased...
This is that onely which Solomon calls The happiness of Wit: and M. Apollonius termeth it, The Light of the Soul, and the Speculum of Wisdom
If you would have the perfect knowledge of any Disease... stand before him and say this Oration three times with great reverence.

Therefore we, to whom such a faculty of the knowledge of the Scripture of Sciences is granted, have wholly received this great gift, and inestimable benefit, from the overflowing grace of the most high Creator.
This is a wonderful Oration... the first part whereof is expounded in the Volume of the Magnitude of the quality of Art.
